# phala_sizes (Data Source)

Lists available CVM sizes (instance types), similar to DigitalOcean sizes.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `family` (String) Optional instance family filter (for example: cpu, gpu, tdx).

### Read-Only

- `sizes` (Attributes List) Available instance sizes. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sizes))

<a id="nestedatt--sizes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sizes`

Read-Only:

- `default_disk_size_gb` (Number)
- `description` (String)
- `family` (String)
- `hourly_rate` (String)
- `memory_mb` (Number)
- `name` (String)
- `requires_gpu` (Boolean)
- `slug` (String)
- `vcpu` (Number)
